title: Issue content link resolution + `/issue` canonical redirect
description: Relative links inside issue.md under-resolved by one level because the root issue.md body is served at the collapsed detail URL (/<tracker>/<issue>), one segment shallower than its file position. Fixed via an issues-only re-rooting postprocessor + a /issue→detail-root redirect. Known remaining gap: sub-doc bodies embedded in the Comprehensive panel.
author: claude
